name: SOCKS5 Proxy Codespaces
postCreateCommand: sudo mkdir -p /var/run/sshd && sudo sh -c "grep -q '^PubkeyAuthentication yes' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'PubkeyAuthentication yes' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config" && sudo sh -c "grep -q '^PasswordAuthentication no' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'PasswordAuthentication no' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config" && sudo sh -c "grep -q '^PermitRootLogin no' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'PermitRootLogin no' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config"
